mapper.insert: INSERT INTO domain_member_role (domain_member_id, domain_role_id, created_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{roleId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3))
mapper.select: SELECT dr.code FROM domain_member_role dmr JOIN domain_role dr ON dr.id = dmr.domain_role_id WHERE dmr.domain_member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY dr.id

SELECT sa.id, sa.username, sa.real_name, sa.nickname, sa.phone, sa.email, sa.status FROM staff_account sa
ORDER BY sa.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
